pi_items.source: verifier.py uses substring matching for 'BMW'|'Car'|'Collection' (lines 84-86); BMW27.blend from official Blender demos (https://download.blender.org/demo/test/) but actual collection names in BMW27.blend not inspected
verifier.py line 81 checks: 'if stroke_count > 10:' - NOT >= 50. This is the actual threshold implemented in the verification code.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on BMW27.blend, an official Blender benchmark file downloaded from https://download.blender.org/demo/test/BMW27.blend.zip (3.1MB, real data source, not synthetic). The task uses real Blender features: Grease Pencil objects and Line Art modifiers (documented at https://docs.blender.org/manual/en/latest/grease_pencil/modifiers/generate/line_art.html). Output is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_line_art.blend. CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: The metadata claims 'min_stroke_count: 50' but the verifier checks 'stroke_count > 10' (verifier.py line 81), meaning the actual minimum is >10, not 50.
